name: join_an_existing_conversation
description: Joins an existing slack conversation (public channel, private channel, or multi-person direct message) by its id, if the authenticated user has permission.

channel.description:
ID of the Slack conversation (public channel, private channel, or multi-person direct message) to join.
Examples:
  "C1234567890"
  "G0987654321"
  "D123ABCDEF0"
